title: lithocarpus daphnoideus
intro: Lithocarpus daphnoideus, also known as the Taiwan walnut tree, is a species of evergreen tree that belongs to the beech family (Fagaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lithocarpus daphnoideus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially lowering blood sugar levels. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of the tree are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
